reviews.review_text: Great park awesome people. Adrian especially was an awesome bloke and great for chat, Chrizelle at the front desk was very friendly and helpful would highly recommend

Our stay at Lake Placid Rainforest Retreat was one of many highlights of our trip. We originally planned to stay just one night, but after unexpected RV troubles, we needed to book a second night at the last minute. We were stressed and unsure of what to do, especially with everything changing so late in the day, but the staff were incredibly kind, accommodating, and quick to help us secure a spot.

The grounds were clean, peaceful, and very well maintained, and the whole property felt safe and welcoming. Their café was also absolutely wonderful. The lady working there was so friendly, warm, and accommodating, and she made breakfast on our first day such a lovely experience. We had some dietary restrictions in our group, and she was more than happy to help with options for everyone.

This stay was such a relief during a chaotic moment of our trip, and easily one of our favourite places we stayed.
Plenty of vacencies for the easter weekend. Check in service was very helpful.

My site is mowed clean tidy with a lovely view to the mountains close to the camp kitchen and pool as requested .
Upon my arrival yesterday the reception staff were welcoming helpful and of good humour .
Which is important to me .
This park has large sites with well kept gardens . The modern attractive spotless amenities are excellent.
The large pool is one of my favourite in this area .
A modern well kept camp kitchen and bar b q area tops off this excellent Park .
Thank you to the owners & staff your care & hospitality is truly appreciated .
Cheers Michelle
A very well run Park very professional clean and tidy and the rain forest is magnificent
Enjoy this beautiful spot
A beautiful place to relax. So sad that one can no longer swim there.

This park has nice big caravan sites and the amenities we cannot fault them. Cleanest we've been in so far. Staff were so friendly and helpful, they made our stay a delight.
I would certainly recommend this park to anybody wanting a quiet stay.
Een camping op een rustige plek, met indien gewenst schaduw. Je kunt ook prima met de bus naar het centrum van Cairns.
Didn't stay in room. The caravan sites are huge very friendly staff. A1
It's a very nice park and the lady behind the counter was super friendly. One of the people I was with bought some food from the cafe and said it was great as well.
Helpful staff. Well set out.
Awesome Park. Clean and tidy.
People at cafe were rude as hell
We're very helpfull and have great facilities
Big thanks  to all at the park couldn't be more helpful while we waited to get our car fixs. Meal at Cafe was great  thanks again
What a great park . The amenities block and kitchen was spotlessly clean. The lady in the office was very warm and welcoming. We’ll definitely stay again when we’re in the area.

We don't often spend money and stay at caravan parks so really love when a park exceeds expectations. Lake Placid Rainforest Retreat certainly did.
The staff were all friendly and helpful, the sites were generous and the amenities were spotless and well cared for. The vibe in the camp was really lovely and relaxing.
We loved the location, close to The Armour and Artillery Museum, Barron Falls, Smithfield shopping, Kuranda and the northern beaches. It was also an easy day trip to Mossman Gorge.  Thank you.
The best we've stayed at so far with 7 weeks behind us. Good size sites and great facilities.

We are currently staying at Lake Placid Rainforest Retreat and I cannot speak highly enough of this park and its staff.

We first stayed here for a few nights on our way up to the cape. We were those disorganised travellers who arrive in town in peak season in the late afternoon with no accomodation booked. The staff in the park bent over backwards to move things around to fit us in.

This time around I was airlifted from cape York to cairns after experiencing a medical emergency. My mum had flown from Perth and my partner and friends needed a place to base themselves so they could be with me in hospital. Again, the staff went well out of their way to accomodate us. We have been here nearly 3 weeks this time and I couldn’t have asked for a nicer place to recover.

The staff have been so compassionate, generous and attentive.

The amenities cannot be faulted. There is a beautiful pool area with BBQs and a camp kitchen that is kept extremely clean.

The toilets and showers are beautifully clean with new upgrades to the showers.

My mum stayed in a bungalow cabin with all you need for a comfortable stay. Housekeeping was on point!

The park itself is lovely. Set below rainforest mountains across the road from a lovely running river. The caravan sites are grassy and spacious and gardens are kept beautifully. It even has a delightful little cafe that serves a mean smashed avo and great coffee!
With close access to shops, doctors and tourist attractions such as white water rafting, the skyrail, a scenic train through the mountains to the waterfalls and lovely walking trails it’s an ideal base to explore Cairns.

I honestly could not fault this place.

Thank you Lake Placid Rainforest Retreat ❤️‍🩹
We loved this park - quiet and friendly and only 15-20 min from town. Sites were large and there was plenty of shed, great pool and amenities were clean, we’d definitely stay again
Van stay awesome and beautiful place, must do sky rail fantastic river cruise was good and the food up there is good

Parfait avec notre motorhome 6 personnes :
- emplacements nickels et bien équipés,
- service impeccable et arrangeant par téléphone notamment pour une arrivée hors horaires d’ouverture de l’accueil
- très bien entretenu et propre (tant espaces de parking que parties communes comme bbq, sanitaires…)
- last but not least piscine très sympa ouverte jusqu’à 21h

Thank you for making our stay enjoyable. The park is lovely and clean along with the facilities. The camp kitchen is very well maintained and pool area. Can’t fault it.
We will definitely be back!!
I love Lake Placid Rainforest resort. It is in a quiet location across from the Barron River. There is a great little Cafe that serves breakfast and dinner from Wednesday through to Saturday.

My family from USA and myself booked 3 cabins recently. We really enjoyed the beautiful serene location nestled in the rainforest with the regular  cheeky bush Turkey visits to the cabins. The pool area and bbq facilities were great for our needs. Large shopping centre only a few klms away and beaches a short drive north. Thanks for your friendly service.

We stayed a week at Lake Placid Retreat Caravan Park in July 2025. Now managed by G’Day group. We had site 80 for our motorhome. A bit of a tight squeeze in. But perfect for 7m length Sprinter MH. Great camp kitchen, showers and toilets very modern like a hotel. Pool was covered with a roof shade cloth to prevent sunburn. It is about 20mins drive north west of CBD. But situated on the banks of the Barron River. It is very peaceful and quiet. There is a little convenience store within walking distance that also sells delicious homemade pies and packaged meals. Smithfield shopping centre is a 5mins drive away. And very convenient location to explore Kuranda and the northern suburbs. We would definitely stay again.
Friendly staff. Great place to stay
Great park, lovely staff. Beautiful walk along river ouside park entrance. Dog fiendly.
Was an okay stay for the 2 nights

Beautiful tidy and clean park but management won’t enforce the rules about noisy guests. Every night we had a neighbour watching tv or  playing YouTube videos extremely loudly but management just said that no other guest had complained. They ring the noisy guests rather than walk down and check the problem in person so of course the noise continues. Other guests also mentioned they had problems and had to call the police as the after hours staff woujd even answer the phone. Place is full of entitled older people who think that they own the place because they stay long term
Nice quiet park with a fantastic cafe. Felt like we were miles from anywhere, but in fact everything is so close by. Great location. Beautiful park. Good amenities.
This is one of the quietest parks we have stayed in and very well kept. Pool is great and the camp kitchen is very good with ample room and tables for sitting with family. Loved our 4 nights stay

I'm a local....severely dissabled.......WITH A 30KG ASSISTANCE DOG....
from FIRST MOMENT ...greeted with smiles and made to feel welcome....
its been EXACTLY the EXPERIENCE I needed to heal ........
Perfect site with big ass tree Like I always wanted..AND ZERO DEAD FALL...well chosen plants means CARE FREE SITE...
NEVER SEEN AMENETIES BLOCKS AS CLEAN AND PERFECT AS HERE...
and the PET SENSITIVE restaurant is A PERFECT CENTRAL HUB complete with crazy locals telling talk stories and smiling faces all around...
how fearless the bush turkeys and wildlife are of humans tells me its a safe sanctuary......
100ft from the MIGHTY BARRON RIVER....lake placid and Barron reserve lake close and very accessible...
WAKING UP INSIDE THE LIGHT RAIN CLOUD COVERING THE HILL IN THE MORNINGS SURROUNDED BY BIRDS AND CREATURES.....BY 9AM A PICTURE PERFECT MILD DAY WITH THE SOUND OF THE BARRON FLOWING OUTSIDE MY VAN WINDOW...
my assistance dog has not been so happy in years as I been very very ill....
TODAY I WAS WELL ENOUGH TO TAKE HIM FOR 2X SWIMS.....
thanx to the nice ladies at front desk for being so kind and welcoming and specially discreet with my disabilities and making me feel NORMAL......
now I'm stressing how I'm gonna tell my dog when we leave....🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣....
He has made many many friends here....seeing him this happy means a great deal to me....My deepest gratitude...

We have been coming to Lake Placid every year since 2014. The park is in a great location just north of Cairns. The grounds are kept to a very high standard and appear even better this year. Ruth and Kerry in reception are friendly and extremely helpful. Darren and Chris keep the park looking tidy and Tracey will keep you fed and watered in the Cafe. A great team effort.
Beautiful caravan park well kept gardens and a cafe
Great Caravan Park
Wonderful caravan park. Peaceful and quiet, except for the birds.
Perfect location, friendly accommodating staff, immaculate amenities.

I had such a wonderful stay at the lake placid rainforest retreat! Ruth was so kind and welcoming! The place is very clean, and very beautiful, nestled in the valley between mountains, Thank you for the beautiful stay 🌴🥰
Peaceful, well maintained, helpful  staff and a beautiful location
Dichtbij Cairns maar toch rustig en omringt door mooie natuur. Fijn zwembad en nette voorzieningen. Fanatieke onderhoudsman start al vroeg ‘s ochtends.

Now the park is being managed properly and the previous management (utterly usless management they were) have finally left, this park could actually be one of the best in Cairns! Hopefully the owner (won't mention names, he knows how run down the place is, not that he cares! And has a MASSIVE ego, might get his panties in a twist if i mention names) finally invests back into the park and actually makes it safe for people to stay there. Stay safe and Hopefully you don't get electrocuted
Amazing staff that’s ladies
Staff were friendly, amenities very clean, lovely spacious sites, quiet location near to cairns!

Stayed at this caravan park, it was 3 years ago I should add.
I hired a cabin, upon entering I was overwhelmed by how disgusting the floors were, they definitely hadn't been cleaned in at least 3 plus months.
The 3 nights I stayed there I made sure to wear my shoes at all times, the cabin was grimey and knew straight away the only thing that was cleaned were the sheets.
It was a pathetic place,, no I don't recommend it

We absolutely love it at Lake Placid Rainforest Retreat. This smaller sized caravan park is peaceful and well kept. The staff in the office are friendly, helpful and always up for a chat. The park is one of the best maintained and clean parks we have been to whilst on our trip around Australia. A short drive to Redlynch or Smithfield for shopping makes it a great location and only 20 mins drive to Cairns. Highly recommended!
I had a great time staying here friendly people everywhere and well priced

Got here on a Monday, left on a Saturday… really should have came earlier.
Ladies in reception are lovely, turkey bar is great.
Ablutions excellent!!
Must recommend .

Care taker that has finally left was rude, no empathy  what so ever,
Phone manners horrendous, Horrible  person to deal with .
New care taker Ruth such a beautiful  lady caring and friendly, easy to talk to all in all lovely lady
Park is beautiful,  clean

Very relaxing site to stay.
Ruth at reception is very welcoming and helpful, would definitely stay again:) cheers.
What a well organised park. Conveniently located a few minutes away from a major shopping centre. Lots of greenery and great facilities. The park also has a great cafe/restaurant

Lake placid rainforest retreat is one of the best caravan parks we have stayed at. It's like being in a rainforest with all the amazing birds and butterflies and beautiful well looked after gardens. The sites are well designed so that you can get maximum privacy, all within close reach to either amenities blocks.
The pool is beautiful, the staff are so friendly and helpful.
The location is great, 2 major shopping centres close and 10 mins to the city by car.
Top notch park, 10/10.
Nice campground with great surroundings. Nice staff, amenities in good condition.

Great place to stay. Rooms need a little more up keep. But I'd still go back there. I didn't give service any stars only because I've not needed any. So cannot rate. Much nicer than staying in the city.

This is the third year we have based our FNQ winter escape at Lake Placid. That alone speaks volumes. The park amenities are fabulous and the view of the rainforest tranquil. The Park café is wonderful. Happy Hour is a great opportunity for people to meet likeminded travellers. Camilla’s cocktails are superb, as is her coffee. Chef Tracey delights us with her fresh tasty food and my partner recommends the waffles for breakfast. The pool is heaven. Can’t fault this place. Sue and Michael are hardworking and friendly keeping the place looking shipshape. Love love love this place. Have made life long friends here.
My favourite caravan park in Australia
Great clean facilities.  Happy hour is good value and you meet new people.
Loved it. Clean, tidy, no hassles, great public areas, helpful friendly staff.
Very good. Tight spot for the van. Great amenities and location.

If budget camping in a tent avoid this place..my car needed repairs and I found myself here for three days unfortunately...sites extremely close together...slamming amenities doors at all hours and I had property stolen by either the permanent residents that live up the back or visitors in the night...I informed park management and the guy was rude and went to ignore me initially...they like catering to the millionaire crew by the looks...told him about $1000 worth of my property stolen...said will look at CCP tv...never heard back.
It's all been wiped out with recent floods and closed off ......   It would be a lovely spot when it's back to it's natural state.
Very pretty great area and helpful staff, nice spot out of Cairns.

Firstly thanks for fitting us in.
Secondly wife parked in wrong spot we left then phoned to move spots the lady going to the spot was happy to let it be we needed a bigger site original one was wider so when we swapped we could not put awning out or sit beside van.
Toilets pathetic code pressing buttons in hard to see no lights on during the night apparently there's a button above hand dryer but no sign it looks like button for dryer.
Showers absolutely discusted for a city town water barely comes out.
Local sight at end of park can't be entered closed down danger.
Shop kitchen closed go up road to local store.

We stayed 2 nights. Clean rest rooms. Staff very friendly. Being a asthmatic wasn't pleasant with smokers beside us, behind us and behind across. For a park that said no smoking on sites was terrible and coughed the whole time. Plus behind us was noisy every night with about 10 or more people.

Located close enough to Smithfield shopping and the highway.
Lovely staff and a clean, organised park.  We enjoyed happy hour and dinner at the restaurant.
Very happy campers. 👍
Beautiful grounds with the rainforest back drop, tranquility at its best,  friendly helpful staff and the bush turkey cafe are fantastic.

Great park
Staff are very helpful and as the approach to some sites is sloped, they will use their own tractor to get you into site if needed.  Sites are flat and a good size.
Also a cafe on site which is a plus

Stayed here for a week in our caravan on a great site. Very neat, clean, well run park. Great cafe/bar with happy hour and yummo food. Not far to shops and local tourist attractions. 20  mins from Cairns centre.  Would definitely stay here again.  Thanks
Lake is closed due to damage..close enough to town.

We had a very late notice booking after picking up a hire campervan on the same day after a lack of planning and booking ahead on our part. We called not expecting anything, but Ruth was a superstar and was able to get a site for 2 nights as long as we could change sites between days, which was fine! We can't rate the service we received, particularly from Ruth, highly enough.
The location is beautiful and had a really relaxed and friendly vibe in the park. Great, clean amenities as well.
Really close to the Kuranda Skyrail which was awesome.

We arrived at the Park 3 months ago at the start of the Tourist season worrying whether we could park our caravan and live in it while house was being built . We were not very successful as we also have a little old dog. We stumbled across this beautiful park  set amongst the rain forest and opposite the Baron River. We were greeted by the lovely Sue who could not have been more welcoming. She was glad to have us even though we didn’t have a set departure date. We picked the perfect site with beautiful trees and afternoon sun shade. We instantly settled in with a beautiful cafe and bar and happy hour 3 nights a week!!! The amenities were beautiful and modern and very clean, the grounds were kept beautiful and the gardener was very friendly and fabulous at his job he kept our site manicured 😀We cannot thank staff and management enough and would highly recommend this park for a perfect holiday destination. Wishing you all the very best 🙌
Great place!!! Thanks heaps Ruth
Was a great caravan Park, which has a happy hour when we got there .   Meet a few great humans . Pet friendly.. at the base of the mountain..

Great place to stay.
We were extremely lucky to get a 3 night stay during the school holidays, and we were booking on the road as we went.
Our caravan site was spacious and tucked up the back corner of the park.
The staff were friendly and helpful
Helped get us onto our site as it was a bit tricky.
Amenities are a little dated but very clean, as is the whole park.
Nestled up to the rainforest.
Definitely recommend this park

Spent a week in a reef villa - comfortable and very quiet. Park was heavily booked but didn't hear a squeak from anyone. Staff very helpful and polite. Nice pool and outdoor entertaining area. Close to Barron Hydro Station walk. Wifi good except during heavy rain. We enjoyed happy hour and breakfast at the cafe onsite. Reef villa has hair dryer, cooktop, microwave, toaster, fridge/freezer and kettle. Laundry available for $5 per wash/dry. Highly recommend this accommodation.

Fabulous location surrounded by palms. Beautiful pool area and outdoor eatery/bar. Happy hour from 4 to 6 was awesome. $5 beer and wine and 2 cocktails for $25. Steak sandwich and chips for $15, so delish. Clean ablutions and great laundry. Stayed a few nights whilst touring Qld. The staff were awesome, very friendly and apologetic for a power outage that was not even their fault (they emailed us beforehand to let us know)
Absolutely recommend this caravan park. LOVED IT 😍

I messed up my booking and the beautiful ladies at the reception desk fixed it for me on arrival. The place is fantastic. You literally stay inside the rainforest. All amenities  are clean and comfortable. Overall five star!
It is very nice and peaceful in the rain forest. The pool was the best part. Me and my sister loved it. She liked the toilet as well.🚽🧻🚿🧼🏊‍♀️💧🐊🪨💙🩵🫶🏻

(Powered site)

What a great park. With mountains as a back drop, river across the road, clean amenities, lovely gardens and blissfully quiet, we thought $51.25 (G'day discount) was very reasonable.

Not far from Central Cairns and a short drive to large Smithfield shopping with Bunnings, BCF plus supermarkets.

Added bonus…Happy Hour between 4&6. Stubbies and glass of wine $5 each with a lovely sitting area.

Food at the cafe was great value, well presented, good size and tasty.

Also surprised to have entertainment provided by a duet for a few hours (Saturday night).

Ticked all the boxes for us so will definitely stay here again on our way back south in a couple of months
Nice spot, expensive powered sites, our area cram in like sadines.
Great camp surrounded by mountains in an ideal location to explore Cairns area and Kuranda. Lovely cool pool and great happy hour 4-6 most days. Amenities nice and clean.

We were greeted by Karen and Ruth when we arrived. They were both very friendly and helpful.
They were efficient in booking us in and also assisted with details helping my at my next stop.
Great work ladies. 👏🏻
What an awesome caravan park, big sites, dog friendly, clean amenities, tropical manicured gardens, Hugh pool and amazing staff , oh and an on-site Licensed cafe how good can you get !

Stayed here for a few nights after relocating from interstate and waiting for a rental to be available. Great self contained cabins with everything you could possibly need. Laundry area was spotless when we went to do some loads and reception happy to swap notes for coins. Beautiful forest surroundings and a stone's throw from the Barron river. Would definitely recommend.
We did not have service during our stay

I phoned the office to inquire about weekly accomadtion and prices, staff member was very rude and ended the phone call with a grunt whilst saying $121 a night  when I simply asked how much the room was for seven nights accommodation.
Think I'd rather give myoney to some one who actually cares about there customers and hopefully show the same respect to the establishment they work at.

OMG😍
Powered sight,$47
Llllovelly Amenities,Salt Pool,
Call ahead for check in options.
Cafe,delicous Cocktails❣️
Absolutely Beautiful Here❣️
Don't want to leave.
March Wet Season still but loving the climate.
Super safty place, with nice pool by the rainforest

Beautiful campsite at the beginning of the rainforest.
Nice swimming pool.
It has all the facilities that you might need.
Lots of wildbirds going around during the night, I personally like it.
Loved the place. Stayed a week. Plenty to do around Cairns. Very clean ablution block. Great cafe only open certain days in the off season.

After the cyclone lake placid was highly damaged in the floods😭,  and the area around lake placid has alot of debris, beautiful spot.
Hope all other facilities  will open as quickly as possible.
Never encountered such poor service.

Stayed here a couple of times for a week or so each time.
Yes it’s a little way out from the city centre but not far.
It’s tranquil, it’s got a decent pool and communal kitchens, the bathrooms are immaculate!
Staff here are super friendly and helpful. Would definitely come back.
It does sort of feel more appropriate for older crew or families who are off doing something most days. Not much for the kids to do, but safe, quiet and clean. Couldn’t ask for much better, well priced and all very fair.

Great caravan park
Excellent service
Very clean and tidy
Beautiful,peaceful

Beautiful spot
Great srevice

Stayed on site 75, obviously the reception staff have no clue, as it's gotta be the worst site! Right by the entry to the mens amenities....disgusting Sewerage smells, grunting, farting, needs a wall or something there, no privacy, its the worst! Not family friendly at all, take your little ones to a safer park, everyone speeds through the caravan park, only 2 speed limit signs in the park, very disappointing.  Someone's gonna get hit by a car there! Reception staff yelled at my son after he fell off his bike into a garden, it was an accident, but she only cared about the garden, didn't bother to check if he was OK.... bloody disgraceful place! 😤 we'd give them 0 stars if possible.

Awesome place perfect for a week or a month close to town and very quiet
Staff are very friendly

We enjoyed our stay. The gardens are beautiful, very well maintained and peaceful. The grounds and amenities were clean. The cafe was a bonus, I had the best smashed avo on toast, ever! Happy hour was fantastic too. I'd definitely stay again.

This has to be one of the best kept secrets. Large caravan sites, quiet area with top facilities close to Cairns but far enough away to not have traffic. Great swimming pool area and one of the best camp kitchens i have ever seen. Small eatery with good food.  A perfect spot to stay.
Great caravan park with pool
Very lovely park..very clean and close to Cairns and the best attractions like the Sky Rail..and Baron Falls and Crystal cascades..Fantastic and amazing features..

One of the best caravan parks we have been to in Australia. Scenic, grassy, shady and peaceful. Great amenities and a lovely pool area and great cafe.
The staff were very friendly and helpful.
Highly recommended.
Great park, excellent facilities and location. Very peaceful.
Peaceful quiet friendly caravan park.

This park is fabulous. The cafe  provided, dollar for dollar, one of the best burgers eva. Great value for money, fresh and tasty. Great chips.
The park is clean, lots of garden and screening, clean modern amenities. We've had a lovely two nights here. Even, street lighting is on sensor lights so no crazy bright lights at night 👍

We really enjoyed our stay, everyone was really friendly and helpful. The grounds and amenities are well kept The park is surrounded by rainforest.|I loved the cafe on site, they have the best smash avo on toast!

Left today after 6 weeks
Great clean, green and well cared for tidy park
Staff always friendly, amenities and pool area always clean and tidy
It's great having the coffee shop for breakfast and early dinner and happy hour at the bar without having to drive
Make sure you have a booking always busy

Good pool.
Clean laundry with free books to read while you wait.
Clean bbq and kitchen.

Only problem was hand dryer did dry hand after 3 attempts and missing tiles in shower.

With telstra and phone didn't work in some parts of Park but they give free WiFi
The best place, the staff is so professional
Shame that it's not operating. Building is starting to show signs of neglect.
Well located for Cairns sightseeing yet quiet at the uphill unpowered sites with clean convenient facilities
A quiet park with good facilities
Back again in 2 weeks. Beautiful place great park and staff are really friendly.
Pretty

One of the best caravan parks we've stayed in during a peak period. Beautiful settting & walking, peaceful, clean modern facilities, excellent camp kitchen and lovely, accommmodating staff. And NO excessive outdoor lighting!!Easy drive to local beaches & attractions Will stay again. Thanks! Jen

Stayed here overnight.
Fantastic well maintained park.
The girls at the front are lovely and helpful.
The pool is just perfect on a warm day.
The grounds, amenities , and facilities are spotless, credit to all staff

We booked at least 6 weeks in advance for a powered site.
Unfortunately for us our site was right on the entry point to the toilets and it was disappointing to hear all of the grunting, groaning and the noise from the hand drier etc, not to mention the foot traffic passing endlessly.
Absolutely no privacy.
This site should be heavily discounted , offered up only if someone is last minute desperate for a stay or at least increased partition installed.
Obviously no rhythm or rhyme  from the booking dates, but first in best dressed applies.
I’ll give you a tip, ask that you don’t have site # 75.

Fantastic place
Highly recommended
Staff are fantastic and really friendly
Services are great
Cafe and bar brilliant
We had two nights here, should have booked more. Nice park, quite packed in but I guess you expect that. Nice clean amenities as was the whole park. We will be back next year. Oh, and dog friendly

If you are a nomad with a massive caravan and 4WD, this will be heaven. Clean well maintained. Nice little cafe Wed to Sun. Cheap beer.
Didn't see many families also not a tent place.
Awesome place to stopover, lovely atmosphere amongst the rainforest, dog friendly, with some great walking spots nearby, will stop there again if I get the chance!
10k nth of Cairns and worth the stay.
Lovely leafy site with a great coffee shop. Staff were so lovely and helpful. Fabulous pool and everything was sparkling clean. Would definitely recommend.
Excellent bar and grill attached to the site office. Very neet. Tropical island atmosphere. I used my tent.
Beautiful rainforest setting.  Clean amenities.  Grassy spots.  The staff are so lovely and helpful.  Would not hesitate staying here again.
Beautiful, peaceful, clean, and staff were very accommodating and friendly.

Found the park amazing beautiful and clean everything well maintained with a lovely cafe come bar to be enjoyed by all.all the staff were very friendly and couldn’t do enough for you. Would recommend to anyone who was looking for a park in Cairns.

This was such a beautiful park. We could have stayed longer than our 4 days here. Everyone is so lovely! We had a meal at the cafe/bar onsite and it was delicious. The dogs were welcomed 🐾  staff so friendly and helpful. Surrounded by rainforest 🍃 facilities so clean.

Joss and Ell
